tooltip.moderndamage.part.head: Head
tooltip.moderndamage.sterile_gauze: Right-click to consume. Cures minor bleeding.
tooltip.moderndamage.cat7_tourniquet: Right-click to consume. Cures major and minor bleeding.
tooltip.moderndamage.israeli_bandage: Right-click to consume. Cures major and minor bleeding.
tooltip.moderndamage.sam_splint: Right-click to use. Splints one existing fracture (converts fracture to splinted).
tooltip.moderndamage.cast_tape: Right-click to consume. Fully heals one existing fracture (including splinted).
tooltip.moderndamage.dr_stitch_suture: Right-click to consume. Repairs one severe trauma.
tooltip.moderndamage.skin_stapler: Right-click to use. Repairs one severe trauma.
tooltip.moderndamage.pfizer_ibuprofen: Right-click to use. Provides pain suppression for 180 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.tramadol_er: Right-click to use. Provides pain suppression for 240 seconds with side effects.
tooltip.moderndamage.creatine_capsule: Right-click to use. Provides enhancing upper limb strength and anti-fatigue effect for 240 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.caffeine_pill: Right-click to use. Provides stamina-boosting stimulant effect for 240 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.homemade_caffeine_e: Right-click to use. Provides stamina-boosting stimulant effect for 180 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.modafinil: Right-click to use. Provides focus-enhancing stimulant effect for 300 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.amoxicillin: Right-click to consume. Provides infection resistance for 1800 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.meclizine: Right-click to use. Provides dizziness resistance for 600 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.oral_rehydration_sa: Right-click to consume. Provides Regeneration I for 5 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.saline_iv: Right-click to consume. Restores 1 health per second for 15 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.ringers_iv: Right-click to consume. Restores 1 health per second for 20 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.voluven_hes: Right-click to consume. Restores 1 health per second for 24 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.albutein_albumin: Right-click to consume. Restores 2 health per second for 5 seconds and grants Coagulation Boost for 60 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.octaplas_plasma: Right-click to consume. Cures major and minor bleeding and restores 2 health per second for 11 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.dextrose_iv: Right-click to consume. Restores some hunger and restores 1 health per second for 6 seconds.
tooltip.moderndamage.johnson_kit: Right-click to use. Restores 2 health and cures either minor bleeding or infection.
tooltip.moderndamage.adventure_kit: Right-click to use. Restores 3 health and cures either major or minor bleeding.
tooltip.moderndamage.my_medic_kit: Right-click to use. Restores 2 health, provides pain suppression for 120 seconds, and cures major bleeding, minor bleeding, or infection.
tooltip.moderndamage.surviveware_kit: Right-click to use. Restores 3 health and cures either minor bleeding or infection.
tooltip.moderndamage.nar_rapid_kit: Right-click to use. Restores 4 health, provides pain suppression for 120 seconds, and cures major bleeding, minor bleeding, or one severe trauma.
tooltip.moderndamage.nar_mfak_kit: Right-click to use. Restores 4 health and cures major bleeding, minor bleeding, or one severe trauma.
tooltip.moderndamage.epinephrine_injecto: Right-click to consume. Provides a powerful adrenaline boost for 60 seconds with strong side effects.
tooltip.moderndamage.morphine_injector: Right-click to consume. Provides pain suppression for 300 seconds with side effects.
tooltip.moderndamage.atropine_injector: Right-click to consume. Provides poison and infection resistance for 300 seconds.
